_publications._publicationTitle: Hybridization Capture-Based Next-Generation Sequencing to Evaluate Coding Sequence and Deep Intronic Mutations in the NF1 Gene.

_contextSnippet: Considering only the 11 unrelated NF1 patients, our approach showed a mutation detection rate of 91% (10 out of 11)...correct interpretation of the pathogenic variation, as confirmed by Sanger sequencing
details: Achieved 91% mutation detection rate (10 out of 11 unrelated NF1 patients) with correct interpretation of pathogenic variations confirmed by Sanger sequencing
